{"id":"project-LICHEN-tmaj","title":"EdhocResource session lookup collision","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:892-895

SECURITY: Session lookup finds first session matching peer_host, ignoring c_i:
```python
for (host, _), session in list(self._sessions.items()):
    if host == peer_host:
        active_session = session
        break
```

If an attacker sends multiple concurrent EDHOC requests from the same host, the lookup may return the wrong session, causing Message 3 to be processed against a different session's state. This could lead to:
1. Cryptographic state corruption
2. Incorrect OSCORE context derivation
3. Potential authentication bypass

Fix: Include c_i in the session key lookup, or extract c_i from incoming messages before lookup.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:30.218195Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:30.218246Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-tmaj","title":"EdhocResource session lookup collision","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:892-895

SECURITY: Session lookup finds first session matching peer_host, ignoring c_i:
```python
for (host, _), session in list(self._sessions.items()):
    if host == peer_host:
        active_session = session
        break
```

If an attacker sends multiple concurrent EDHOC requests from the same host, the lookup may return the wrong session, causing Message 3 to be processed against a different session's state. This could lead to:
1. Cryptographic state corruption
2. Incorrect OSCORE context derivation
3. Potential authentication bypass

Fix: Include c_i in the session key lookup, or extract c_i from incoming messages before lookup.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"ec2-user","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:30.218195Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:05:35.704997273Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T18:05:35.704997273Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T18:10:35.704997273Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T18:05:35.704997273Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-tmaj","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-whr4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:05:52.985093529Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
